caption: The video displays a screen recording of a website called RANDOM.ORG, specifically its "List Randomizer" tool. The interface features a vertical list of numbers from 1 to 10 rearranged in a random order. A chat window on the right shows messages from users "engeld" and "Nightbot," including the text, "I think if you are a team signing Ohtani, you are going all in on everyone you can" and a link to "the BREAK SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE." A banner for "CASEBREAKS.COM" appears at the bottom with a logo featuring a stylized red and white design. Throughout the sequence, the page is refreshed multiple times; the randomized number lists change, and the "You have randomized this list" counter increments from 6 to 9 times. The timestamp on the page progresses from 03:24:03 UTC to 03:24:05 UTC.
